seasonal_adjustments: Yes, but we're extending Saturday hours to 2 PM starting January. Also, we've added Sunday emergency-only availability. We won't take regular calls on Sunday, but if it's an emergency, route it. Otherwise Sunday callers should hear that we're closed and will call back Monday.

office_address: 2200 West Indian School Road, Phoenix, AZ 85015
emergency_definition: But plumbing emergencies don't wait — a burst pipe in a restaurant kitchen at midnight means they're losing thousands of dollars an hour.
Active water leak or burst pipe
Gas line damage or gas smell
No hot water in a hotel or healthcare facility
No hot water at hotels or healthcare
Any plumbing issue at a restaurant during their operating hours is emergency priority — they have to shut down their kitchen if water isn't working
Flooding from any source in a commercial building is emergency
Oh and I want to be more specific about gas: any gas smell near a water heater or boiler should be treated as immediate emergency with a safety warning to leave the building.
And whether it's a restaurant or other facility type.
integration_constraints: We use ServiceTrade. Clara can create service requests for non-emergency stuff — plumbing repairs, water heater quotes, backflow testing. But for emergency calls, just route them, don't create tickets.
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours: Greet caller, note office is closed, determine purpose, check if emergency. If emergency: collect name, number, address, attempt routing via escalation chain. If non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Business hours: Greet caller, determine purpose, check if emergency. If emergency: collect critical info and route immediately. If routine: collect name and number, transfer to office. If transfer fails: take message, confirm callback timeframe.
excluded_services: irrigation or sprinkler systems — the lawn kind
custom_greeting: Thank you for calling AllStar Plumbing and Mechanical. This is Clara, how can I help you today?
non_emergency_collection_fields: those questions for non-emergency grease trap scheduling
size of the trap and when it was last serviced
account number if they have it
notes: Updated from onboarding call. Confirmed operational details override demo assumptions.
